headline: Dairy Blends Market Forecast and Company Analysis Report 2026-2034 Cargill, Kerry, Archer Daniels Midland, Tate & Lyle, Aak, Dana Foods, Royal FrieslandCampina, Galloway
summary: The Dairy Blends Market is poised for robust growth, projected to surge from USD 3.65 billion in 2025 to USD 8.40 billion by 2034, exhibiting a CAGR of 9.71% from 2026 to 2034. Key drivers include the rising demand for cost-effective dairy substitutes, expanding applications in bakery and confectionery, and a shift towards products with enhanced texture and nutritional content.
